title: Hot Pink Acrylic Vase, Modern Acrylic Geometric Wide Mouth Small vase, Hot Pink Flower Vase for centerpieces Desk Flower Bud vase, for Living Room Table, Office, Wedding
features: Exquisite Purple Acrylic Centerpiece Vase: Elevate your decor with our striking Purple Acrylic Centerpiece Vase. Its vibrant purple color brings a sense of energy and sophistication to any room, creating a focal point that captures attention. Notice(The vase has a protective film, please tear off the film when using the vase which may be a little difficult to tear)

Versatile and Modern Design: Crafted from premium-quality acrylic, our centerpiece vase is not only visually appealing but also highly versatile. Its sleek and modern design effortlessly blends with various decor styles, making it an ideal choice for contemporary spaces.

Wide Mouth for Creative Arrangements: The wide mouth of the vase provides ample space for creative floral arrangements. Whether you prefer a single statement flower or an elaborate bouquet, this vase allows you to showcase your favorite blooms in a captivating way.

Captivating Acrylic Decor: Our Purple Acrylic Centerpiece Vase is more than just a functional piece; it's a work of art. Its vibrant purple hue and contemporary design make it a stunning decor accent, adding a pop of color and personality to your space.
